notes: Each option's 'id' is the eLogbook data-nodeid used to select the procedure in the form (the value for WebView injection). 'name' is the display label / extraction target. A procedure may appear under several categories; the flat 'procedures' list is the authoritative deduplicated picklist, 'tree' preserves the on-site accordion structure for the picker UI and for giving the AI category context. | Curated spoken-form aliases added 2026-07-01 for 93 common operations (223 aliases), each validated against the live norm()/resolveProcedure() logic so it resolves to its intended catalogue entry; zero collisions. Long-tail procedures remain alias-free and match on exact/substring. Ambiguous bare terms default to the commonest variant (e.g. AVR/MVR/TVR -> adult non-congenital; 'aortic root replacement' -> Aortic root surgery).
